CustomField.description: Queue DeveloperName to assign the matched record's owner to. The routing service looks up the Queue by DeveloperName at runtime — keeps the rule decoupled from queue Ids that change per org. Mutually exclusive with Target_Role__c (rule fires whichever is set).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: DeveloperName of the target Queue. Leave blank if Target Role is set.
CustomField.label: Target Queue
